description: The `aspire-py-starter` template has been migrated from `dotnet new` to the Aspire CLI template factory with a TypeScript AppHost, removing the .NET SDK requirement for the AppHost project. Use `aspire new aspire-py-starter` instead of `dotnet new aspire-py-starter`. Supports optional Redis integration via `--use-redis-cache`.
name: Python starter template migrated to CLI template factory
